region: Gap-fill: France, England (pure finance), Iceland, UAE, Ireland

portalsChecked: EURAXESS Jobs (https://euraxess.ec.europa.eu/jobs) — France country filter, Economics/Management fields
jobs.ac.uk — PhD Scholarships category, Accountancy & Finance sub-discipline, Business & Management Studies
FindAPhD — United Kingdom / Finance / Financial Economics / Financial Management / Banking / Investment categories
AcademicPositions.com / academicpositions.fr / academicpositions.nl — Corporate Finance, Finance, Accounting fields
ABG (Association Bernard Gregory) — Banking & Finance thesis offers
FNEGE offres d'emploi (France business school academic jobs)
Official university/school pages: HEC Paris, ESSEC, EDHEC, SKEMA, INSEAD, IÉSEG/LEM, Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne, Université de Limoges (LAPE), Université Côte d'Azur (GREDEG/DESPEG)
Official UK pages: Exeter, UCL SoM, Durham, Oxford Saïd, Manchester AMBS, Liverpool ULMS, Sheffield, Heriot-Watt EBS, Reading

Official Ireland pages: UCD (Banking & Finance Dept, Smurfit School, School of Economics), Trinity Business School/Economics, University of Limerick (Kemmy), University of Galway (Cairnes/Accountancy & Finance), Maynooth University (School of Business, Economics), DCU Business School

Official Iceland pages: University of Iceland (Business Administration doctoral programme, UI Doctoral/PhD Grants Fund, Viðskiptafræðideild), Reykjavik University (Dept. of Business and Economics PhD, RU Research Fund)

Official UAE pages: American University of Sharjah (PhD-FIN, PhD-BA Finance concentration, PhD-MGT), University of Sharjah (DBA), Khalifa University, Abu Dhabi University, Ajman University (DBA), Zayed University, British University in Dubai (BUiD), Heriot-Watt Dubai, Middlesex University Dubai, Canadian University Dubai, University of Wollongong in Dubai, University of Dubai

targetGapRegions.france: 4 already verified (EconomiX rolling, Lorraine CEREFIGE 12/09/26, Angers GRANEM 28/08/26, HEC Paris round 04/01/27)
targetGapRegions.englandPureFinance: 0 already verified (existing England entries are EPSRC circular-economy-finance/AI-labour-markets and legal/HR studentships, not pure finance/accounting research projects)
targetGapRegions.iceland: 1 already verified (University of Iceland Economics ConCIV, 04/08/26)
targetGapRegions.uae: 4 already verified (AUS PhD-FIN, AUS PhD-BA Finance, UOWD, University of Dubai)
targetGapRegions.irelandBeyondThree: 3 already verified (UCC CUBS, UL KBS open-topic, DCU part-time fee-only)

searchSummary.conclusion: No additional OPEN, funded, finance/accounting/compliance/corporate-finance/audit/M&A/IB/healthcare-finance PhD offers were found in the five gap regions beyond what is already in phd-verified.json, as of 2026-07-12. Root cause is cycle timing: virtually every specific-project, funded PhD studentship/scholarship for a September 2026 start in these regions and domains has an application deadline that already fell between January and June 2026 (i.e. already closed by the 2026-07-12 verification date), while the September 2027 intake cycles at the major research-active institutions (INSEAD, SKEMA, EDHEC, TSE, ESSEC, Paris Dauphine-PSL, IÉSEG, Heriot-Watt EBS beyond its 2 already-listed EPSRC projects, UCD Banking & Finance, Trinity Business School, University of Galway Hardiman/Cairnes, Maynooth School of Business, Khalifa University, Abu Dhabi University, Ajman University DBA) have not yet opened (typical open windows are Sept-Dec 2026 for Sept 2027 starts). This mirrors and confirms the same finding already documented in batch-wave3-france-2027.json for France specifically; this wave extended the same conclusion to England (pure finance), Iceland, UAE and Ireland.

skippedNoFunding.title: PhD in Business Administration (Viðskiptafræði) — open admission, self-financing plan required
skippedNoFunding.reason: Rolling admission year-round but no guaranteed funding; applicant must submit own financing plan. Competitive Doctoral Grant Fund (only funding route) had 2026 deadline 01/02/26, already passed.

skippedNoFunding.title: PhD in Business Administration — Dept. of Business and Economics
skippedNoFunding.reason: Rolling twice-yearly admission (30 Apr / 5 Nov) but funding is self-sourced/competitive RU Research Fund grant (separate application, no dedicated finance project); not a guaranteed funded position.

skippedNoFunding.title: PhD Finance / PhD Accounting, Banking, Finance — Edinburgh Business School
skippedNoFunding.reason: General PhD Finance and Dubai Accounting/Banking/Finance research pages are explicitly listed as 'Self-funded'; only the 2 already-verified EPSRC-funded topics (circular economy finance, AI & labour markets) at the Edinburgh campus are funded and open.

skippedNoFunding.title: PhD in Business Management (incl. finance-adjacent research) — partial scholarships only
skippedNoFunding.reason: Rolling admission; scholarships are partial tuition discounts (10-20%) for distinction/alumni/family/strategic-partner categories, not project-specific finance funding with a named supervisor/topic — too generic to record as a discrete finance PhD offer without overstating specificity.

skippedNoFunding.title: Doctor of Business Administration (DBA)
skippedNoFunding.reason: International applicants must provide 'evidence of self-funded scholarship' — self-funded, not university-funded.

skippedNoFunding.title: PhD Scholarship for International/UAE National Students (merit-tiered, no dedicated finance project)
skippedNoFunding.reason: Merit-tiered scholarship exists and can be fully funded, but Fall-semester application deadline is February 10 each year (passed for 2026 intake) and there is no dedicated open finance/accounting/business research project — business/finance research sits under the PhD in Engineering Systems & Management (ESMA), an engineering degree, not a finance PhD.

skippedNoFunding.title: Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne 'stratégie d'établissement' contrats doctoraux (8 slots, deadline 20/08/26)
skippedNoFunding.reason: Genuinely open (deadline 2026-08-20) but restricted to transdisciplinary/Una Europa thematic priorities (European studies, sustainable development, cultural heritage, One Health, data science & AI, materials of the future) with candidate-proposed topics — not a finance/accounting/compliance-labeled call, and the 87 école-doctorale-level contracts (incl. Économie ED465 and Management EDMPS, which do cover finance) have their own calendars not yet published (EDMPS funding page states doctoral-contract applications open 'early September', i.e. not yet open as of 2026-07-12).
